CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2023 Continued To May-01-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MATTHEW TRAVIS' MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS SETTLEMENT

Appearances via Zoom: Kyle Nordrehaug of Blumenthal Nordrehaug Bhowmik DeBlouw for plaintiff and moving party; Conor Dale of Jackson Lewis for defendant and responding party.

Discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for preliminary approval of class settlement" is granted. Further, the Court schedules a final approval hearing for March 21, 2024. Order signed after the hearing. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/RBU)
